title: Hotel de verano
writer: Neftali Beltrán, René Cardona, Ernesto Cortázar
actors: Ramón Armengod, Janice Logan, Enrique Herrera
plot: This Musical-Comedy from Director Rene Cardona, features American actress Janice Logan as the dutiful daughter who is about to wed a much older man and widower as part of an arranged marriage orchestrated by her Father. Plans quic...
